# Extracted Library Layer

This folder contains canonical extracted stores created from admitted sleeve sources.

These stores are not the same thing as the main normalized MOLT libraries under `blocks/molt/`.
They are a structured intake/canonicalization layer for sleeve-derived artifacts.

## Stores
- `neostacks/` - extracted stack inventories by sleeve
- `neoblocks/` - extracted neoblock inventories by sleeve
- `molt-extracted/` - extracted sleeve-derived MOLT block inventories by sleeve
- `manifests/` - indexes for the extracted library layer
